metadata.title: ToiME Staycation — Your Getaway Destination
metadata.description: Book your homestay/villa with 4 flexible booking types: Good Morning, Midnight Hot, Overnight, Fast & Furious.

hero.subtitle: Enjoy a cozy, peaceful retreat surrounded by nature

booking_types.overnight_desc: A full day of relaxation, fully equipped
booking_types.fast_furious_desc: Choose 3, 4 or 5 hours — flexible to your needs

about.title: Rest your way
about.description: ToiME Staycation offers a cozy retreat immersed in lush nature. Every room is carefully designed with natural wood furnishings, creating a sense of home amidst the countryside.
about.description_2: With 4 flexible booking types — from daytime rest to hourly packages — you choose the experience that suits you best. No account needed, book quickly with just your name and phone number.

review_1.text: Very peaceful and cozy space. The host is friendly, rooms are clean. Will definitely come back!
review_1.name: Nguyen Thanh

review_2.text: Midnight Hot booking is very convenient — great price for a weekend night. Beautiful view, perfectly quiet.
review_2.name: Tran Huong

review_3.text: Villa Garden is spacious, the small kitchen is great for families. Private garden is wonderful for kids.
review_3.name: Le Minh

faq_1.q: Do I need an account to book?
faq_1.a: No! Just enter your name, phone number, and email (optional) to book instantly.

faq_2.q: Is Good Morning available on Sundays?
faq_2.a: No, the Good Morning booking type (09:00–18:00) is not available on Sundays. Other booking types work normally.

faq_3.a: We currently accept bank transfer payments. Account details will be shown after booking.

faq_4.a: Contact us directly via Zalo or phone to cancel. We'll confirm the cancellation via message.

faq_5.a: Choose a 3-hour (399,000đ), 4-hour (499,000đ), or 5-hour (549,000đ) package, then pick your preferred date and start time.

booking_wizard.page_subtitle: Choose your booking type, date, room and complete in a few steps
booking_wizard.select_type_desc: Each type has different check-in and check-out hours
booking_wizard.type_good_morning: Good Morning: 09:00 – 18:00 same day (not available on Sundays)
booking_wizard.type_overnight: Chill All Day: Check-in 14:00, check-out 12:00 next day
booking_wizard.type_fast_furious: Fast & Furious: Choose 3/4/5 hours, pick your start time
booking_wizard.available_rooms_desc: Rooms available for your selected time
booking_wizard.no_rooms: No rooms available for this time. Please select a different date.
booking_wizard.guest_info_desc: No account needed — just your name and phone number
booking_wizard.success_desc: We will contact you to confirm via Zalo or phone
booking_wizard.error_sunday: Good Morning is not available on Sundays
booking_wizard.error_invalid_duration: Please choose a 3, 4 or 5 hour package
booking_wizard.error_invalid_start_hour: Start time must be between 8:00 and 21:00
booking_wizard.error_name: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters)
